{"id":"project-LICHEN-idtk","title":"codec.rs: Integer overflow in UDP length for large payloads","description":"File: rust/lichen-schc/src/codec.rs
Lines: 203, 557-558, 787-788

Category: CORRECTNESS

The UDP length is computed by casting to u16 without overflow checking:
```rust
let udp_len = (8 + payload.len()) as u16;  // line 203
let udp_len = (8 + coap_len) as u16;       // line 558
let udp_len = (8 + tail.len()) as u16;     // line 787
```

If payload/tail length exceeds 65527 bytes, the addition overflows u16 and silently truncates, causing:
- Incorrect UDP length field in reconstructed packet
- Wrong checksum calculation
- Corrupt packets

While SCHC is typically used for constrained networks with small packets, the code should handle this edge case safely.

Fix: Check for overflow before cast, return BufferTooSmall error if exceeded:
```rust
let total_len = 8usize.saturating_add(payload.len());
if total_len > u16::MAX as usize {
    return Err(...);
}
let udp_len = total_len as u16;
```","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:40:15.113332Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:40:15.113376Z"}

Lines: 203, 557-558, 787-788

Category: CORRECTNESS

The UDP length is computed by casting to u16 without overflow checking:
```rust
let udp_len = (8 + payload.len()) as u16;  // line 203
let udp_len = (8 + coap_len) as u16;       // line 558
let udp_len = (8 + tail.len()) as u16;     // line 787
```

If payload/tail length exceeds 65527 bytes, the addition overflows u16 and silently truncates, causing:
- Incorrect UDP length field in reconstructed packet
- Wrong checksum calculation
- Corrupt packets

While SCHC is typically used for constrained networks with small packets, the code should handle this edge case safely.

Fix: Check for overflow before cast, return BufferTooSmall error if exceeded:
```rust
let total_len = 8usize.saturating_add(payload.len());
if total_len > u16::MAX as usize {
    return Err(...);
}
let udp_len = total_len as u16;
```","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:40:15.113332Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T23:14:18.235857983Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T23:14:18.235857983Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T23:19:18.235857983Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T23:14:18.235857983Z"}
